# workflows

This directory contains GitHub Actions workflows for continuous integration and automated testing of the JotCAD codebase.

## Workflow Inventory

* **[ci.yml](file:///home/brian/github/jotcad/.github/workflows/ci.yml)**: The primary Node.js CI workflow that builds the C++ native operators, sets up dependencies, installs the Chrome browser for Puppeteer, and runs the full test suite.
